name: Jules.Solutions Platform
description: AI agent infrastructure — connect via MCP or install the local runtime

tier.description: Full = local runtime + MCP. Remote = MCP only.

steps.name: Detecting environment
steps.description: Check OS, Claude Code, uv, Python

steps.name: Authentication
steps.description: Sign up or log in at auth.jules.solutions, get API key

steps.name: Configure MCP
steps.description: Write .mcp.json with jules MCP server entry

steps.name: Install jules-local
steps.description: Install local runtime via uv tool install

steps.name: Verification
steps.description: Test API, auth, and MCP connectivity

completion.message: Setup complete! Restart Claude Code to use jules MCP tools.
